description: Modify the Tk plot.tcl demo script to visualize real NOAA monthly average temperature data for Pittsburgh, PA. The script at ~/Documents/plot.tcl currently shows a generic 2D plot with arbitrary data points. You must edit this script so that it reads the CSV weather data from ~/Documents/pittsburgh_weather.csv and plots the 12 monthly average temperatures (Avg_Temp_F column) as data points on the canvas. The X-axis should show months (Jan through Dec) and the Y-axis should show temperature in Fahrenheit. After editing, save the file and run it with 'wish ~/Documents/plot.tcl' in the terminal to display the updated plot. The plot window should be visible with the weather data rendered.

metadata.data_source: NOAA 1991-2020 Climate Normals, Pittsburgh International Airport (KPIT)
